value.body:
## Problem
When Light mode is selected in the desktop app settings, visiting a website URL still shows the active UI/theme as Dark mode. Settings continues to show Light mode selected, so the saved preference and applied theme appear to be out of sync.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Open the desktop app.
2. Go to Settings and select Light mode.
3. Visit/open a website URL inside the app.
4. Observe the rendered theme and the Settings theme selection.

## Expected behavior
The website view and app UI should render in Light mode while Light mode is selected.

## Actual behavior
Settings shows Light mode selected, but the active visible theme remains Dark mode.

## Impact
Users cannot reliably apply Light mode when browsing website URLs, and the settings state is misleading.

frontmatter.title: Light mode setting remains selected but website view renders dark theme

value.title: Light mode setting remains selected but website view renders dark theme
